hero.tagline: Full-stack engineer building end-to-end systems for real-world operations.
lines: Sole developer at An Giang Ferry JSC, building a ticketing and ferry operations system for 7 ferry terminals and around 60 users.

items.value: Go, TypeScript, JavaScript, SQL, PHP, Python

desc.goal: Deliver a WordPress website for information lookup and customer service request submission.
desc.role: WordPress developer (freelance) responsible for end-to-end delivery.

job.summary: Built a WordPress website and Telegram automation to support customer service operations.
sub_jobs: Delivered a WordPress website that lets customers look up information from existing data and submit service requests.
Developed custom WordPress features/plugins in PHP based on client needs.
Built Telegram chatbot automation hosted on Cloudflare Workers.
Improved the customer request flow with a simpler self-service experience.

result: Website delivered and met customer needs.
Telegram chatbot reached about 1,500 participants in around 2 weeks.
desc.tech: WordPress, PHP, Telegram Bot API, Python, JavaScript

desc.goal: Build an AI-assisted business dashboard prototype for performance analysis, CRM data management, and reporting/insights.
desc.role: Application Developer Intern, also supporting requirement clarification and weekly stakeholder alignment.

job.summary: Evaluated a low-code stack and helped build a prototype aligned with business goals.
sub_jobs: Contributed to an AI-assisted business dashboard prototype.
Evaluated and implemented a low-code analytics stack using NoLoco, Airtable, and Zoho Analytics.
Gathered requirements, clarified scope, prioritized features, and aligned weekly goals with stakeholders.
Balanced delivery speed with cost and implementation complexity.

result: Prototype met customer needs and supported product direction decisions.
Balanced delivery speed with cost and implementation complexity.

items.name: AGF Ticketing & Ferry Operations System
items.meta: An Giang Ferry JSC, Oct 2025 - Present

desc.goal: Design and build a ticketing and ferry operations system for 7 ferry terminals, around 60 users, handling 15k-40k tickets per day.
desc.role: Software Engineer (Sole Developer) responsible for the full lifecycle from design and development to operations.

job.summary: Built a ticketing and ferry operations platform with an on-prem, self-managed server architecture optimized for daily operations.
sub_jobs: Delivered 2 web apps: a ticket-selling web app and a data/invoice management and revenue reporting dashboard.
Designed a self-hosted Admin Server for central management/reporting and Mini Servers at each terminal for local operations and resilience.
Implemented backup/restore and failover to minimize downtime during network/device incidents.

result: Replaced the legacy system without source-code access.
Reduced ticket validation latency by about 75% in production workflows.
Improved usability for non-technical operators while reducing maintenance cost and increasing technical autonomy.
desc.tech: Go, SQLite, REST APIs, JWT Auth, Vanilla JS, Windows scripting (.bat/PowerShell)
